name: Steve Chabot
subject: Peace in the Middle East?
body:
They gave Obama the Nobel Peace Prize, for goodness' sake! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Peace in the Middle East?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Tale of Two Conventions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats finished their national convention last week and the Republican national convention just finished its second night. One convention featured speaker after speaker portraying America as a failed nation full of misery, poverty and angst. Meanwhile, the other convention celebrated everything that makes America the greatest country on earth and focused on the potential that our country can achieve in the future. In this week's blog I discuss both conventions and tell you which I'd rather attend! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [So is Kamala Harris Really a Moderate?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-u/)
The mainstream press has their marching orders and have shifted into full gear trying to paint Biden's Vice-Presidential pick, Kamala Harris, as a moderate. In this week's blog, we examine Harris' record, and what we find will unequivocally answer the question - is Kamala Harris really a moderate? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Biden Picks Kamala. The Unconventions. And Biden Makes Another Racist Comment.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Last night, the Biden campaign confirmed he is choosing Senator Kamala Harris to be his running mate. To many this was no surprise. However, what is surprising is just a few months ago, in the Democratic debate, Harris confronted Biden about having worked with segregationists in the Senate and discussed her personal history with busing. In this week's blog I discuss Biden's selection, the upcoming national conventions for both parties and yet another racially insensitive comment from basement Joe! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkutiijl-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: This boils my blood

body:
American citizens chanting “Death to America”
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=285A467A1A6139)

| | |
---
| | Friends,

‘Death to America’.

The chant famously popularized by the Iranian government.

Yet this time, being used by American born citizens in California.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=285A467A1A6140)
---
| | |
---
| | While millions of immigrants have come to the United States because it is the greatest country in the world offering freedom and opportunity, some Americans are calling for a complete dismantlement.

Meanwhile, Speaker Nancy Pelosi refused to condemn those chanting ‘Death to America’ in her home state and instead went on MSNBC calling the President and Republicans in Congress the ‘domestic enemies’.

It’s angering and heartbreaking.

We can’t allow the far left to divide and destroy our country.

[Two months from today, we have to elect leaders in Congress who will stand strong against Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad. We have 61 days to FLIP this seat and TAKE BACK the House. Can I count on you to pitch in $5, $25, or even $100 to help preserve America?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=285A467A1A6141)

TX-10 is shaping up to be one of the closest battleground districts in the country -- _and Mike is on the verge of flipping it!_ But we’re up against a Republican incumbent with deep pockets with dark money and corporate PAC backers propping him up.
**The only way to take down someone like Michael McCaul is with a people-powered movement.** Mike is rejecting ALL corporate PAC money, so he needs our help to compete. Are you in to help us flip Texas?
Thank you,
Kendahl

body:
61 Days until Election Day! |
---
Peter, The work we do leading up to Election Day will determine whether we win the battle for the soul of our nation. The only way we will defeat Donald Trump is by coming together as a country to organize and win. And we can't do this without you. [There's a lot of exciting things happening on the campaign, and we're not taking our foot off the gas. Will you commit to joining one of the virtual events in your community?](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.03_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.03_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.03_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.03_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [**WHAT: **North Pocono, Dunmore and Moscow - Daily Phone Bank!

**TIME:** 3:00 pm EDT

When we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter.
Thanks for being in this fight!
Biden-Harris HQ

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5b3/3844057315/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5b2/3844057315/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5b1/3844057315/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5b0/3844057315/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5af/3844057315/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5ae/3844057315/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5ad/3844057315/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5ac/3844057315/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5ab/3844057315/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5aa/3844057315/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5ad/3844057315/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b182/1cd0ac28/157d708f1/3570f5a8/3844057315/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Messner
subject: Corky needs YOUR help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4dd2349d542262a1/2ab4a0b91d2ae11ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

The countdown is on. We have just 5 days to go until the Republican primary for this must-win U.S. Senate seat.
Today, I’m writing to ask for your help. In these crucial days our hard-working volunteers will put us over the top!
**Before****Primary****Day, we need your help to make phone calls to potential Corky supporters**. This is crucial to our field strategy. With a close election, it's important we ensure that EVERY conservative knows exactly where Corky stands on the issues!
**On Primary Day, we need to show the world just how dedicated all of Corky's supporters are**. That's why we're recruiting volunteers to work the polls. In this role, you'll engage with fellow citizens still on the fence about their vote.
_We're also reminding voters that I have President Trump’s _“Complete and Total Endorsement”_ in this race. The President knows I have his back, and that I don’t back down from the tough fights_.
If you're able to volunteer (or have any questions), please email Team Messner's Field Director, **[Ryan Nichols (Ryan@CorkyForSenate.com)](mailto:ryan@corkyforsenate.com "ryan@corkyforsenate.com")**. [ ](mailto:ryan@corkyforsenate.com) Let’s fight with all we’ve got to WIN the primary on September 8th, and move on to defeat Jeanne Shaheen and the D.C. Democrat machine this November!
\- Team Messner
P.S. Even if you aren't able to volunteer, it's important that you VOTE for Corky! If you have questions about how and when to vote, [_**please visit our official election center**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4dd2349d542262a1/0aa848ac1dbdefe4c3d6b838967d376c/33153). | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4dd2349d542262a1/dc5cfa558ed088e9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4dd2349d542262a1/3811c94e13961a26c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

subject: bumping Eugene’s message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
South Central PA deserves better than this, friend.
Friend,

**I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see Eugene’s note on the hurtful, divisive comments Scott Perry made yesterday.**

South Central PA deserves better than this, friend. Eugene has dedicated his career in public service to fighting for the issues that impact all of us, and in Congress, he will be the independent leader our community deserves.

**[Please, take a moment to read Eugene’s note below and, if you’re able, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to our campaign to help us end Scott Perry’s career in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18986398/245849774/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.03_b1_rvte_all-nd&refcode2=c8e9a55a-f6ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU5YTU1YS1mNmVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1T7eh3FA2GRNl1KFTSmTEzOsN-UayLNa3-2vNQVIo0=) **

Thank you,

Rachele Fortier, Campaign Manager On Wed, Sep 2, 2020 at 6:44 PM Eugene DePasquale wrote:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18986400/245849776/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.03_b1_rvte_all-nd&refcode2=c8e9a55a-f6ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU5YTU1YS1mNmVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1T7eh3FA2GRNl1KFTSmTEzOsN-UayLNa3-2vNQVIo0=)
Friend,

This is not an email I want to send you, but I wanted you to hear directly from me. Our country has faced so many challenges this year -- a global pandemic, rising economic anxiety, and a long overdue reckoning with systemic racism.

I sympathize with the pain, anger, and grief that communities of color have felt this year. **And that’s why I was so disappointed to see Scott Perry’s divisive comments today:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18986401/245849777/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.03_b1_rvte_all-nd&refcode2=c8e9a55a-f6ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU5YTU1YS1mNmVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1T7eh3FA2GRNl1KFTSmTEzOsN-UayLNa3-2vNQVIo0=)
Friend, these comments are just plain wrong, and they speak to how out of touch Scott Perry is with this district. We need a real leader who isn’t afraid to take our most difficult and pressing issues head-on -- not dismiss them as nonexistent or sensationalist.

**Let me be clear when I say that Scott Perry is no longer fit to lead -- he has proven that he lacks the courage to rise to the occasion and unite our community.**

We deserve so much better, friend. That’s why my team and I are working to deliver real change and bring new leadership to South Central PA, but I can’t do it without you. [**If you can, I hope you consider joining this fight by chipping in to our campaign now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18986402/245849778/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.03_b1_rvte_all-nd&refcode2=c8e9a55a-f6ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU5YTU1YS1mNmVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1T7eh3FA2GRNl1KFTSmTEzOsN-UayLNa3-2vNQVIo0=)

In this together,

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/1-ohN4Sba9ABxs3bCbjiEs4ErS96nf3s-42kGGRcFZE=?refcode=090320)
| | Friend, Can you believe it? Two months from today, Minnesotans will be at the polls. The ground is rapidly shifting. [According to FiveThirtyEight](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/DIQLur5Akzc3I9vcV6_vWkZwqWMvLVzYkSMZOef3WDM=), Minnesota is looking more and more like the tipping point between four more years of divisive Trump politics and a Joe Biden & Kamala Harris victory. Control of the Minnesota Legislature is also on the line. [A major Republican special interest group just announced](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/DZTSCVbcgJZFFp6EP-lP37g9RbLJgC_sg79hGV9Iz-c=) a huge investment of $500,000 to flip the Minnesota House and maintain control of the Minnesota Senate. **Here 's the deal: we currently hold 13 seats in the legislature that Trump won in 2016, and we are working to protect our 7-seat majority. **Will you make a grassroots investment in our campaign today? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/1-ohN4Sba9ABxs3bCbjiEs4ErS96nf3s-42kGGRcFZE=?refcode=090320) We cannot let Republicans and their special interest friends take over our state this November, there is too much on the line. We have two months to win this election, let's get to work. Thank you, House DFL Team [**_P.S. Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. Take advantage of it today._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/1-ohN4Sba9ABxs3bCbjiEs4ErS96nf3s-42kGGRcFZE=?refcode=090320) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IDxXRGteUcvcD16je3jFugpjYkOsfWEqv7fdSNy8WDA=/1-ohN4Sba9ABxs3bCbjiEs4ErS96nf3s-42kGGRcFZE=?refcode=090320)

body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18988487/245884807/-1883385859?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200903_Jayapal_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGFhZTNhYi0wMGVlLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-jB5vDHxzE6Nfh6t1lrM0HnrANTP0E2MXcAuzSO8Hk=) We’re facing a historic moment in this country where everything we care about is on the line. Our progressive movement — one that fights for guaranteed health care, good jobs, economic opportunity, humane immigration reform, and equality — is gaining incredible momentum in Congress and on the ground across America. By putting people over profits and communities over corporations, we’re making gains for the rights and wellbeing of Americans in every corner of this country. But our fight is far from over; we still have a long way to go. _And if we’re going to continue to make progress, we need to elect bold progressive champions to Congress this November. In order to do that, we have to build grassroots, people-powered movements right now._ **That’s why I’m proud of the campaign that Mike Siegel is running for Congress. And it’s why I’m excited to endorse him today.** He’s spent his career advocating for the most vulnerable among us — both in the courtroom and the classroom. I can’t wait for him to join me in Congress. But with his Republican opponent being propped up by millions in dark money and launching horrible false attacks, Mike needs our help to win. **This is a pivotal moment.** We will not only need to reverse four years of damage done by the Trump Administration, we will need to quickly make progress too. We will need to have the Progressive majority necessary in Congress to pass policies that guarantee health care to every person, ensure a habitable planet for future generations, secure a living wage for workers, fully fund our public schools, and so much more — _and there’s absolutely no time to waste._
There’s a human cost to delaying any of these sweeping policy changes. **That’s why we need fighters like Mike Siegel in Congress who won’t rest until every person has a fair shot.**
But Mike’ powerful dedication to progressive causes makes him a top Republican target — they’re investing millions to stop his momentum and prevent him from flipping TX-10. [**Will you join me and Progressives everywhere in helping send Mike to Washington so we can build our progressive movement at the moment it matters most? clean_body: | | = We’re facing a historic moment in this country where everything we care about is on the line. Our progressive movement — one that fights for guaranteed health care, good jobs, economic opportunity, humane immigration reform, and equality — is gaining incredible momentum in Congress and on the ground across America. By putting people over profits and communities over corporations, we’re making gains for the rights and wellbeing of Americans in every corner of this country. But our fight is far from over; we still have a long way to go. And if we’re going to continue to make progress, we need to elect bold progressive champions to Congress this November. In order to do that, we have to build grassroots, people-powered movements right now. That’s why I’m proud of the campaign that Mike Siegel is running for Congress. And it’s why I’m excited to endorse him today. He’s spent his career advocating for the most vulnerable among us — both in the courtroom and the classroom. I can’t wait for him to join me in Congress. But with his Republican opponent being propped up by millions in dark money and launching horrible false attacks, Mike needs our help to win. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = This is a pivotal moment. We will not only need to reverse four years of damage done by the Trump Administration, we will need to quickly make progress too. We will need to have the Progressive majority necessary in Congress to pass policies that guarantee health care to every person, ensure a habitable planet for future generations, secure a living wage for workers, fully fund our public schools, and so much more — and there’s absolutely no time to waste. There’s a human cost to delaying any of these sweeping policy changes. That’s why we need fighters like Mike Siegel in Congress who won’t rest until every person has a fair shot. But Mike’ powerful dedication to progressive causes makes him a top Republican target — they’re investing millions to stop his momentum and prevent him from flipping TX-10. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In solidarity, Pramila | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

name: Vote-by-Mail Alert
subject: Obama and Abrams need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The soul of our democracy is at stake.
| | |
---
Friend, the soul of our democracy is at stake - and we need to make sure every single voice is heard at the ballot box this November.
But Republicans are launching an all-out assault on voting rights across the country, attacking vote-by-mail and forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights. **That's why Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are calling on YOU to help defend our right to vote before it's too late: **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk609-su-nd")
This isn't just hypothetical, friend: With all the dirty voter-suppression tricks played in 2018, Stacey Abrams fell just _55,000_ votes short of winning her governor's race. We can't let history repeat itself - Democrats across the country have to speak out NOW.
**We need to hear from just 46 more Democrats in Georgia by midnight, but we're still missing your response. With the most important election of our lifetimes before us, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fab/7f51f7bc/421e0266/4efadcc2/1715215217/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Today's a big milestone, Peter:

We're now just two months out from Election Day. That means two months until we decide whether Texas will continue to be represented by a senator who consistently sells us out to the highest bidder, from the gun lobby to Big Pharma to the private detention industry.

**[I'm working to make sure we aren't -- but I need your help. Pitch in, if you can, to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn two months from now on November 3rd.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fab/7f51f7bc/421e0266/4efadcc1/1715215217/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200903.1nd__2057__&amount=10")**

At stake in this election is whether Texans will have a senator who fights to get them the help they need to get through the COVID-19 crisis, or a senator who calls expanded unemployment insurance a "mistake." Whether we have people in power working to get our kids back to school safely, or people throwing their hands up in the air and sending kids back to school despite the risks.

It's whether we have a senator who fights to repeal the Affordable Care Act, or one who works to expand health care to make sure that _everyone_ can get the care they need. Whether our leaders fight to combat climate change, or leave our children to deal with its consequences.

As a working mom and combat veteran, I'll fight to do the right thing for families all over Texas. After 18 years in Washington serving special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell, the same can't be said for Sen. Cornyn.

**I still need your help to keep our momentum going so we can beat Sen. Cornyn this November. If you 're able, please make a donation to help us flip Texas in just two short months.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jason Yates
subject: Volunteer and impact the November elections
body:
| | Peter, The election is two short months away and we are committed to making a difference. We know you are, too. **Will you****[ _volunteer with us_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSzTZmjY4WZWRD1ysuF3YKydN0P3HpTzhpMSPmSVs05_Xmjnwc4gehfnm9bDleImn4Vt53RLWd_06Mjee8NM8thZSC9_kqomR6xNjnaD_sjf3kaWscT2S2LUEect_us7Lk3CYTHaK6B7K3PLij__DwiWIFJhwehX8IPr6jDii-RWh-iAERi_odb1b8Ft3aMGnA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200903com01&n=1) in our efforts to ensure that Christians impact the future of this nation?** We have all the tools to assist you in making a difference in November! As you are probably aware, there were approximately 40 million Christians who did not vote in the last election. Of that, 15 million have yet to register. This is alarming and we must do whatever we are able to reduce that number. If you're in a dilemma as to where to donate your time because so many candidates need you, help them all simply by motivating Christians to vote. If we successfully increase the number of Biblical voters, then we help many God-fearing candidates get elected, not just one. Jesus said to go into the nations, not just invite them into our churches. Let us therefore go into our nation and bring candidates with a Biblical worldview into positions of decision making, decisions that affect every single one of our lives on a daily basis. Please know how grateful we are for any amount of time you have to partner with us. We will do our best to ensure your time is used in the most effective way possible. To that end, we ask that you tell us the tasks that best fit your comfort, knowledge, and skill set. Additionally, when you choose to volunteer with us, we will be providing you with a discount code for our My Faith Votes store. Below is the link to our volunteer sign up. Please take 5 minutes to let us know you are willing to make a difference for the future of America. We promise your information is protected. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSzTZmjY4WZWRD1ysuF3YKydN0P3HpTzhpMSPmSVs05_Xmjnwc4gehfnm9bDleImn4Vt53RLWd_06Mjee8NM8thZSC9_kqomR6xNjnaD_sjf3kaWscT2S2LUEect_us7Lk3CYTHaK6B7K3PLij__DwiWIFJhwehX8IPr6jDii-RWh-iAERi_odb1b8Ft3aMGnA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200903com01&n=2) Pray. Think. Vote., Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200903com01&n=3)
---

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Victoria Spartz for Congress in IN-05
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 3, 2020
---
| Contact: Kory Wood Kory@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6005
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Victory Spartz for Congress in IN-05
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Victoria Spartz for Congress in IN-05.
Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Kory Wood stated:
"Victoria Spartz is a proven conservative and a tireless fighter for liberty, less government, and more freedom. We know she will bring that same track record and commitment to Hoosier values to the Halls of Congress. Victoria has our full support."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Rules for you, not for her
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a business owner and I think it's long past time to open the economy!**

Anyone with an ounce of common sense can see that, if murderous Antifa rioters can gather night after night, then reasonable people can gather and conduct commerce. Shops can open, people can work, students can go to school, and life can go on!
The Democrats can't let life go on. If life goes on, they lose their crazy tyrannical Covid lockdowns.
You know the worst part of those anti-liberty lockdowns? The Democrats only want the common people to be under them, but they don't want to be subject to the restrictions themselves!
_**In Chicago, the nutty Mayor Lightfoot got her hair done at a salon while shutting down salons to ordinary people.**_
_Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot, a Democrat, defended a haircut she received recently despite salons and barbershops shutting down under the state’s stay-at-home order.
Lightfoot was criticized for her actions after previously stating in one of her public service announcements that “ _getting your roots done is not essential_ ,” according to the Chicago Tribune.
The controversy began when the stylist posted photos with the mayor on Facebook last weekend, thanking her for her hard work and saying she had the “pleasure of giving Mayor Lightfoot a hair trim.”
The stylist was wearing a mask and gloves, the mayor said in defense of her haircut during a press conference earlier this week. “I’m the public face of this city. _I’m on national media and I’m out in the public eye._ ”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw)
---

_Now, Nancy Pelosi has done the same thing- after criticizing President Trump for not being tough on Covid, Pelosi demanded a hair salon open FOR HER ONLY:_

_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited a San Francisco hair salon on Monday afternoon for a wash and blow-out, despite local ordinances keeping salons closed amid the coronavirus pandemic, Fox News has learned.

In security footage obtained by Fox News, and timestamped Monday at 3:08 p.m. Pacific Time, _the California powerhouse is seen walking through ESalonSF in San Francisco with wet hair, and without a mask over her mouth or nose._

The stylist doing her hair can be seen following her wearing a black face mask.

Salons in San Francisco had been closed since March and were only notified they could reopen on Sept. 1 for outdoor hairstyling services only._

**_When confronted with the obvious hypocrisy of her actions, you know what Pelosi did? She had the nerve to blame the salon owner!_**

_Nancy Pelosi is speaking out, demanding an apology from the hair salon in San Francisco.

Pelosi got her hair done Monday before hair salons were allowed to operate in the Bay Area.

That salon is owned by a Fresno native Erica Kious. Kious also provides hair services near Palm and Nees Avenues.

The general manager of Sola Salon Studios says she’s a good person who got caught in the crossfire, but Pelosi throwing Kious’ salon in the San Francisco under the bus.

“ _This salon owes me an apology for setting up, we trusted a neighbor salon that I’ve been to for years,_ ” Pelosi said.

The salon controversy continues after a video surfaced of the Speaker of The House, was seen getting her hair done in San Francisco on Monday._

_Those of us around in the 1990s may remember DC Mayor Marion Barry, when caught smoking crack with a prostitute, claiming "B*tch set me up!"._

This is about as bad as that. But this is what Democrats do, isn't it? After all, Barry was re-elected twice more AFTER being caught!

**Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you or your health. They just want to control you with rules that they themselves don't obey!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g2aLwxbL23Nxmng&b=WQn.1Hmrj7U3E9eTBQkAsw)

Sandy Smith

Anyone with an ounce of common sense can see that, if murderous Antifa rioters can gather night after night, then reasonable people can gather and conduct commerce. Shops can open, people can work, students can go to school, and life can go on! The Democrats can't let life go on. If life goes on, they lose their crazy tyrannical Covid lockdowns. You know the worst part of those anti-liberty lockdowns? The Democrats only want the common people to be under them, but they don't want to be subject to the restrictions themselves! In Chicago, the nutty Mayor Lightfoot got her hair done at a salon while shutting down salons to ordinary people. Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot, a Democrat, defended a haircut she received recently despite salons and barbershops shutting down under the state’s stay-at-home order. Lightfoot was criticized for her actions after previously stating in one of her public service announcements that “ getting your roots done is not essential ,” according to the Chicago Tribune. The controversy began when the stylist posted photos with the mayor on Facebook last weekend, thanking her for her hard work and saying she had the “pleasure of giving Mayor Lightfoot a hair trim.” The stylist was wearing a mask and gloves, the mayor said in defense of her haircut during a press conference earlier this week. “I’m the public face of this city. I’m on national media and I’m out in the public eye. ” Now, Nancy Pelosi has done the same thing- after criticizing President Trump for not being tough on Covid, Pelosi demanded a hair salon open FOR HER ONLY: House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited a San Francisco hair salon on Monday afternoon for a wash and blow-out, despite local ordinances keeping salons closed amid the coronavirus pandemic, Fox News has learned. In security footage obtained by Fox News, and timestamped Monday at 3:08 p.m. Pacific Time, the California powerhouse is seen walking through ESalonSF in San Francisco with wet hair, and without a mask over her mouth or nose. The stylist doing her hair can be seen following her wearing a black face mask. Salons in San Francisco had been closed since March and were only notified they could reopen on Sept. 1 for outdoor hairstyling services only. When confronted with the obvious hypocrisy of her actions, you know what Pelosi did? She had the nerve to blame the salon owner! Nancy Pelosi is speaking out, demanding an apology from the hair salon in San Francisco. Pelosi got her hair done Monday before hair salons were allowed to operate in the Bay Area. That salon is owned by a Fresno native Erica Kious. Kious also provides hair services near Palm and Nees Avenues. The general manager of Sola Salon Studios says she’s a good person who got caught in the crossfire, but Pelosi throwing Kious’ salon in the San Francisco under the bus. “ This salon owes me an apology for setting up, we trusted a neighbor salon that I’ve been to for years, ” Pelosi said. The salon controversy continues after a video surfaced of the Speaker of The House, was seen getting her hair done in San Francisco on Monday. Those of us around in the 1990s may remember DC Mayor Marion Barry, when caught smoking crack with a prostitute, claiming "Btch set me up!". This is about as bad as that. But this is what Democrats do, isn't it? After all, Barry was re-elected twice more AFTER being caught! Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you or your health. They just want to control you with rules that they themselves don't obey!** Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I ! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5c5/3095761427/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5fa/3095761427/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5fb/3095761427/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5c7/3095761427/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5c1/3095761427/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b286/18e32a7f/4a7874a2/7b20f5f8/3095761427/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

Peter,

Today marks exactly two months until Election Day.

Two months to do everything in our power to cement a path to 270 Electoral Votes.

The math is simple, Peter. The more resources we have at our disposal, the more voters we can talk to over the next two months, and the more votes we can win in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of this election.

If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a4/1cd0ac28/1576982c4/3570f84f/3702174656/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a4/1cd0ac28/1576982c4/3570f84e/3702174656/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a4/1cd0ac28/1576982c4/3570f84d/3702174656/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a4/1cd0ac28/1576982c4/3570f850/3702174656/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How We're Developing a COVID-19 Vaccine at ‘Warp Speed’
body:
Thanks to Operation Warp Speed, “the entire process for delivering a safe and effective vaccine . . . is underway and on track" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74507ccddd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How We're Developing a COVID-19 Vaccine at ‘Warp Speed’**

Thanks to Operation Warp Speed, “the entire process for delivering a safe and effective vaccine—to be assessed by FDA’s apolitical scientific experts just as any other vaccine would be—is underway and on track,” HHS Secretary Alex Azar writes in _USA Today_.

“We are immensely encouraged by the progress so far, and hope to celebrate the successful delivery of a safe and effective vaccine in large quantities in the months to come.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfc026e00b&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**GM, Ford meet President’s goal to produce 80,000 ventilators!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=359b79785b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump is ordering the federal government to begin the process of defunding New York City and three other cities where officials allowed ‘lawless’ protests and cut police budgets amid rising violent crime.” The President’s decision will help ensure Americans’ taxpayer dollars are not wasted by lawless governors and mayors who refuse to protect their communities. Read more from Steven Nelson in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=390eeb089d&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “A new wave of media stories is sadly using veterans to score political points against the Trump administration—this time by alleging delays in the delivery of prescription drugs by the U.S. Postal Service . . . It’s disappointing to see how comfortable some are with presenting misinformation to advance a political agenda,” Veterans Affairs Secretary Robert Wilkie writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c66812954a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A U.S. Commission on Civil Rights member has urged Seattle Mayor Jenny Durkan to end her city’s Whites-only diversity training program”—called the ‘Internalized Racial Superiority for white people’ program—“saying it likely violates federal prohibitions on segregating employees by race,” Valerie Richardson reports for _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e72378b683&e=3ee4985eea)._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5ba5d68d8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce9be82293&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f1ae24ad5f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e838/77d4c309/2192e237/2635ea16/208102789/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e838/77d4c309/2192e237/2635ea11/208102789/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e838/77d4c309/2192e237/2635ea10/208102789/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

subject: Strengthening our Senate

body:

As Chairman of the Senate Republican Conference, it’s my responsibility to unite Senate Republicans and advance our conservative agenda. I’ve made it my top political priority to protect our conservative Senate Majority.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, As Chairman of the Senate Republican Conference, it’s my responsibility to unite Senate Republicans and advance our conservative agenda. I’ve made it my top political priority to protect our conservative Senate Majority. While Chuck Schumer and the radical Left are fixated on the FOUR seats they need to take control of the Senate, Republicans are focused not only on defending the hardworking men and women up for re-election, but also our pickup opportunities. That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. Mark Ronchetti is the strong conservative voice New Mexico deserves and desperately needs. Mark has pledged to stand up and fight for all those who feel abandoned by the Democrats who only represent their favored groups. Will you join me in supporting Mark’s fight? Let’s send Mark to the Senate to STRENGTHEN our Majority and represent your conservative values! Having the privilege of fighting for the great people of Wyoming, I know that rural values are just as important as any other -- something the Left seems to have forgotten. New Mexico has not had conservative representation in the U.S. Senate since 2007... It’s time to change that, and I know that Mark will stand with me to fight for our shared values and advance the conservative agenda. Please, join me in supporting Mark Ronchetti’s bid to flip this blue seat RED and send him to fight for your values in the Senate! We need him to strengthen our Majority! Thank you for your commitment to our cause, Senator John Barrasso (R-WY) Senate Republican Conference Chairman | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

body:
Mondaire wants to hear from you, so please take our brief survey.
#

Friends,
From healthcare access to reopening schools to voting, there isn’t a single part of our lives that this pandemic hasn’t impacted.
It’s no exaggeration to say that our country is a dramatically different place than it was when Mondaire first decided to run for office.
But even after COVID-19 is no longer a threat, there will be many other issues that the next Congress will need to address.
**[Can you take our brief priorities survey to let Mondaire know which issues you think are most important for him to address in Congress? body:
|
| | Hi folks,

This week’s been an amazing week for our campaign!

**First:** Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to break our digital monthly fundraising record in August!

**Then:** Our campaign was endorsed by the Michigan Democratic Party Rural Caucus!

**Now:** I am _ready_ to start working to address the needs of rural Michiganders by ensuring they have a voice, especially when it comes to broadband internet access and healthcare, but I need your help. name: Darin LaHood
subject: Have you seen the polls?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
The same pollsters who got it wrong in 2016 are predicting another blue wave on November 3rd. Do you trust the polls? | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=390fbdd1b3264f0b98da3b10bb7ff57a&_e=RTqBLRW9XfRwXK-vUD4nZD8AFLSki2PwYyHtNT9SSlnajzQI6ns5zX5rUp0ycHQYcSIq2Di2EefRJDlSq9bjUB5PCQNJHp8ze_PuRxGGQVvqdITW8vtoJ6cU4jiqZ644lftO8V14qqoTMNlqyVVqjfUlFOBUV-yF147LpF0Ok3gA6uwVHufmZCHSN7GVTm6C96TAIxfCARhbAoBl-ZDPNDzCH-AsSsDPPMPai2IB9H56CoT6lFSF17UgNrrN_Xv9HZjXXhscgt8iOwUobpKnzIq1bsngIrDdOPtKCrHUaAJwi85kXLTeCA85Es2446dubK2iwQFc-cWLppkYliw5JheY0gXm2l8FPhFkQLzxLZzEyZq-os9Ds73f1jP3Cm25tdybmXFcG4qng0LKXD_giJ-NQdpmCN-gIYgjoZsx_Dqwromztzvf7k1kNFamtCFzLee5_1eSNTngvUeRPYSG869cjZOiJ7ZNxVUzfruHSlI%3D)
|
---
Friend,

If 2016 taught us anything, it’s this:

_**Even the most “reliable” and “accurate” pollsters get it wrong.**_

Just about every single poll predicted that Hillary would win the Presidency – and we all watched on election night as the pundits’ jaws dropped as they became speechless at the fact that they got it wrong.

**Now those same pollsters and pundits are saying that Joe Biden will win by double-digits, Texas will turn blue, and Republicans don’t have a chance at taking back the House on November 3rd.**

I want your take on this – do you trust the polls?
[**YES, I TRUST THE POLLS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=390fbdd1b3264f0b98da3b10bb7ff57a&_e=RTqBLRW9XfRwXK-vUD4nZD8AFLSki2PwYyHtNT9SSlnajzQI6ns5zX5rUp0ycHQYjhkrL0DHGJrnqG9E8SVSjvmgfM1p0_P0B5HSHi8WpoaCLdyhSMJeaUUeNien-TSzkVXNNL-8exIqR_mZM1FqXq25PQ6cPrleQyFsb8XQqB_Q6WEVNks0be0rLc26_IED8nySKlANcgQl-X_GXpimXEuFV-5-dwbglEUmsllqt9--53Vupf-zPBsFFWqoULf1H3mmQOSZ7AFGE5WLu4ayehS-HibFhdpA8DeXXaI9IfjB31PQC-7raX1Nb3hyAkDUS1CnGyqRSb65mDWGT6d37TO8hLgKwGzcytV-ppevxEp5HDYZQZbS0-P8XnPK8Mx-8rOv7BUmmMIbCnW1Rp3Tvnikt6wgWZkyKlJTUuRN05tC5n51w5tbc_dHutpwZoikpxOx317D7P7uyBI_7ABF20nrkXqDeHIzmCcqUGNCBiuKeX7DVQ0Jr9IGQ5vzXAZp55PssGu6P0bRAbqFj5Ek8g%3D%3D)
[**NO, I DON’T TRUST THE POLLS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=390fbdd1b3264f0b98da3b10bb7ff57a&_e=RTqBLRW9XfRwXK-vUD4nZD8AFLSki2PwYyHtNT9SSlnajzQI6ns5zX5rUp0ycHQYjhkrL0DHGJrnqG9E8SVSjvmgfM1p0_P0B5HSHi8WpoZuNSzlNagSX6MY-sE0Hx6mPHppLCzLUFu_UA5a3ETC3hYo9om2zzjbzSyJsCYCNXMUHUiNrwZ_OCkU_GesBxRQOHpE59k8zNb_dbhLfTM1jQBtj-seAy1T-558--xWkYtFuByAp0GTV4m5vsKIjE2OA--Mk7YhU-KO9kplZ3CQe0rVWJv_XSC3iSKAaWjKAc9B9kKRKBaFiNLygsd9fDTcBmtQBRRv55i_2qJ0DTW1vyAqfK-a9U9ippdO16gozdRwm2Kbvib3fvuw8Pbc_rWQH_0O6_z63S-v-7EG7pzeuigdlHEOcB81OeuKSqpMN4XsYzVi_bCWILA3Si5PKQ5BxXcJdXyNrWAZAHRjIGdPpEDhGX5WvqVLBAHPmpPFzgJdvLB3Xolf6OnuWN37tyYkT7EYsDKcDYLd2xWqPz-2SA%3D%3D)
Critical battleground districts and states across the country could be decided by razor-thin margins – _and with everything on the line right now, that could be the difference between a strong America and a socialist America!_

We’re running a critical race to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi this year, and we can’t afford to get sidetracked by unreliable sources trying to sway voters.

**Let’s keep our eye on the ball.**

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: LISA SCHELLER ACCEPTS LIBERAL SUSAN WILD’S CHALLENGE FOR A FOURTH DEBATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER ACCEPTS LIBERAL SUSAN WILD’S CHALLENGE FOR A FOURTH DEBATE

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

ALLENTOWN, PA – Yesterday, Susan Wild’s D.C. based campaign manager, Katie
Gladstone, challenged Lisa Scheller to a fourth debate. The press release,
which included a D.C. phone number, laid out a list of demands for how the
debate should be hosted. Alex Meyer, Lisa Scheller’s campaign manager, has this
to say about it:

“Lisa is excited to participate in a fourth debate where we can openly and
freely discuss Congresswoman Wild’s far left voting record. It is perplexing
that earlier this week Rep. Wild declined to appear in in-person events for the
remainder of the campaign, but now she wants to face Lisa for a fourth debate
with an unlimited in person audience, as you said, ‘free and accessible to
all’, all in the matter of two days?

Since Susan answers to Nancy Pelosi’s beckon call, I presume we should invite
her as well -- we’ll be sure to make the adequate arrangements--three stools on
stage, with a microphone where Nancy can tell Susan how to respond, since Susan
already votes with Nancy 99% of the time.

I am happy to meet with you in person to work out the date, location,
moderators, and ground rules. We can either meet up here in the 7th
Congressional District, or I’m happy to travel to Washington, D.C., to meet
with you since you and the campaign team are living and running the campaign
from there.

I appreciate you reaching out, Katie. The voters of Pennsylvania’s 7th
District deserve to hear from the candidates directly about their vastly
different visions for the future of our country. Rep. Wild’s support for
defunding police, higher taxes, and the green new deal versus Lisa’s support
for law enforcement, economic policies to help small businesses, and her
willingness to be an independent voice for voters.”

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.
Unsubscribe

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: The Election is already here, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Time is of the essence. |
---
Hi friend,

It's hard to believe, but today we are officially TWO MONTHS OUT from Election Day.

But this year is different. The ongoing pandemic necessitates early voting and voting by mail, which means Election Day isn't just on November 3. **The Election is already here.**

Time is of the essence, friend. We are doing everything we can to reach voters all across the state, and we can't afford to slow down now.

**_We need to make sure we get in touch with voters before they cast their ballots, which for many is in just a few weeks._**

Our campaign is surging, but I need your help.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help carry this momentum all the way through November 3?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed70/1970865170/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed73/1970865170/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_10")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed72/1970865170/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_25")** **[Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed75/1970865170/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_50")** **[Express Donate: $75](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed74/1970865170/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_75")** ****[Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed77/1970865170/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_100")**** ****[Or, donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed76/1970865170/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths_ex_other")**** My opponent is getting MASSIVE support from outside groups based in Washington.

In fact, Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than any other Democratic Senate candidate in the country -- _and they just committed another $6 million on top of that!_

**Mitch and his donor network are SCARED of losing Georgia, friend.**

But I know something Mitch doesn't: We have an incredible grassroots team supporting this campaign. That's you.

**[Will you help me fight back against the McConnell-Perdue dark money machine?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ba7/5b2c1286/38636738/25f0ed70/1970865170/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?refcode=em_2020_09_03_twomnths")**

Jon

| Friends, Did you watch the WMUR debate last night? Then you saw my Republican Primary opponent Matt Mowers **blatantly lie to the voters of New Hampshire about owning a nearly million dollar condo in Washington DC, his wife's undisclosed salary at CNN and the $100,000 he made during a mysterious trip to Korea**. [>>>Learn more about it here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMTk2NjYwNDQzMjg4OTA2JmM9eDNiNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNDYzMDUmZD1qOXU5ZzB2.w99moG-U8ZgvOikkcXT1WwyxgqP6IGVQTQxGKFkRl4w) When asked about each of these items during the debate, Mowers said that it wasn't true. Unfortunately for Mr. Mowers his [financial disclosure](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMTk2NjYwNDQzMjg4OTA2JmM9eDNiNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNDYzMTQmZD1pM2c3dzdy.a1EFyievRt7DqDRvd1KWEyXFSgv1iQ8FehZVmXkP_Dg) form and [deed](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMTk2NjYwNDQzMjg4OTA2JmM9eDNiNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNDYzMjAmZD1jM2c5YzBp.bvgLl26S_ta0HpKO4XoSb8tUCUYaq6F9maBW7rhNwXc) don't lie. The Republican voters of New Hampshire deserve better than a dishonest New Jersey carpetbagger and the truth is that **someone that lies to NH voters this badly cannot win in November**. I am doing everything I can to spread this truth, but I need your help. [Will you consider contributing $15, $25 or even $50 to my campaign to help us stop this general election disaster](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMTk2NjYwNDQzMjg4OTA2JmM9eDNiNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNDYzMjkmZD16NHoyZDN2.hkhvB0R8YnipFuEyE1spLbqD6SVG2ZY4AY_lzZYuW64)? Chris Pappas can be beat this year, but we need the best candidate if we want to win. Please consider joining my team today! Thank you, Matt

Voters from every corner of the district and every political stripe realize that the choice is between Rick’s pragmatic, people-first vision and Pete Sessions’ self-serving agenda.
**Texans aren’t fooled by Sessions’ clear desire to go back to the Washington swamp, where he was a favorite of corporations and special interests.**

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: Chris Wallace is moderating the first presidential debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
All eyes are on September's presidential debate.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi) Friend, Remember Ken Bone? He was the guy in the red sweater who asked the _only_ question about climate or energy in the 2016 presidential debates. [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/848?t=3&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi) _In 2016, Ken Bone asked Hillary Clinton and Donald Trump: "What steps will your energy policy take to meet our energy needs while at the same time remaining environmentally friendly and minimizing job layoffs?"_ We can't let that happen again. Americans are demanding answers on the urgent climate crisis. We need debate moderators who step up to the plate and press Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Donald Trump, and Mike Pence to tell America how they will address it. **[The first Biden-Trump debate is less than a month away, so we want to know: What climate questions would YOU like to see the candidates answer? Sign your name to demand climate be front-and-center in the 2020 debates, and add your questions here.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/848?t=4&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi)** Polling shows that voters (including in key 2020 battleground states like Arizona, Iowa, Maine, and North Carolina) care deeply about the climate crisis -- even more so now than in 2016. It's a key area for candidates to show real vision and resolve. We just heard that Fox News' Chris Wallace will be moderating the September 29 debate between Trump and Biden, and there's still time to influence the course of the discussion. I don't know about you, but I want to hear less about plastic straw bans and more about how we're going to lay the foundation for a clean-energy-led economic recovery and hold big polluters accountable. **[Add your name and your climate question here to share what YOU want to see the candidates answer.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/848?t=5&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi)** Thanks, Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action | [ASK A QUESTION ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/848?t=6&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2658%2E53494%2ESdfKgi). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2020 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

name: NHGOP Press and Communications
subject: ICYMI: Former NH Senator And Prosecutor In Cop Killer Case: Feltes-Volinsky Pledge To Commute Sentence “Extremely Disturbing”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc0OTkmZD16M3I0bDVm.PB8b4u_gMXZmviPRO-5DpfBAsL73pbLyCTP7Igdumxc)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Derek, Wanted to flag this release from the Republican Governors Association for you:
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Former NH Senator And Prosecutor In Cop Killer Case: Feltes-Volinsky Pledge To Commute Sentence “Extremely Disturbing”** Former New Hampshire U.S. Senator Kelly Ayotte eviscerated Democratic gubernatorial candidates Dan Feltes and Andru Volinsky for [pledging to commute the sentence](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MDUmZD1uNmk1ZzBv.SY_niUKipzbDsJjygAkWav7PGTF7I37frzTkBqrpE4s) of convicted police killer Michael Addison in a primary debate aired this week.

As New Hampshire’s Attorney General at the time, Ayotte [personally prosecuted](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MDgmZD1mMXE1eDJh.zJrUcTZxzh6d9w3t5neOJIj1zanhhJXk__0d5R1-i0o) the 2006 case against Addison, who was convicted of shooting 35-year-old Manchester Police officer Michael Briggs [in cold blood](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MTQmZD1kOGk0dDh5.Gr3WfYxcJxjtNkK_aoJf_fmSMpxqi0RAmAVTs5dMGiA) when Briggs had not drawn a weapon. Addison’s conviction was unanimously [upheld](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MjAmZD13NW00aDVj.wskxbA41hTTam3egYSysRCjDBcYtLMGrPkRCJ9eyZh4) by the New Hampshire Supreme Court in 2015.

In a blistering [statement](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MjYmZD13MG44ejhj.YHC5wHbzt3BKc0rNeBHj_aV12c1EB0TQWXiDvaZMF1o) issued Wednesday, Ayotte excoriated Feltes and Volinsky for refusing to stand “against violence directed at our police officers,” and failing to “appreciate the difficulty and danger our police officers face” while praising Governor Chris Sununu for “standing with law enforcement”:

> _“Today I watched the tape of the Democrats Gubernatorial Debate between Dan Feltes and Andru Volinsky,” she said in a statement. “It is extremely disturbing that both said they would commute the sentence of convicted cop killer Michael Addison who murdered heroic Manchester Police officer Michael Briggs in cold blood.
>
> “Addison is a career criminal who had committed multiple armed robberies the week before he shot Officer Briggs in the head. Addison was convicted by a jury of his peers and his conviction was upheld by the New Hampshire Supreme Court. At a time when law enforcement officers are facing increasingly dangerous situations on a daily basis, our leaders should be standing against violence directed at our police officers, not commuting the sentences of convicted cop killers.
>
> “It is clear that neither Andru Volinksy nor Dan Feltes appreciate the difficulty and danger our police officers face when they put their lives on the line every day to keep us safe. I commend Governor Sununu for standing with law enforcement in N.H. and stating clearly that he would never commute Michael Addison’s sentence,” Ayotte said._

Governor Sununu [responded](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MzImZD1uNHc4aDZh.CV2v5mUhJ-VotUaeBPTZKXLxQ0Nk7K1FLzAXAX1OQVk) to the Democrats’ disturbing pledge on Tuesday, stating he was “shocked,” and would “never support commuting” Addison’s sentence:

> _“Let me be very clear: I will never support commuting the sentence of a convicted cop killer like Michael Addison. I heard that clip [from the debate]. I was quite shocked by it. I think everybody in Manchester should be quite shocked by it.
>
> “Frankly, I think it sends the absolutely wrong message that when you have a convicted cop killer, you’re going to now decide that you would commute his sentence. I would never support that,” Sununu said._
Officer Briggs left a wife and two young sons behind when he was shot and killed by Addison. One of his sons, Officer Mitchell Briggs, [graduated](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyMjEzMTg0MzkwNDM2MDg4JmM9ejl1OCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDEwNzc1MzUmZD1kMXgxdTd1.tMRcaPoTDFgUH5XicKrsCKSZmOwnzEN2I522NiJZD4Q) from the New Hampshire Police Academy in 2019.

---
---
| |
---

As New Hampshire’s Attorney General at the time, Ayotte the 2006 case against Addison, who was convicted of shooting 35-year-old Manchester Police officer Michael Briggs when Briggs had not drawn a weapon. Addison’s conviction was unanimously by the New Hampshire Supreme Court in 2015. In a blistering issued Wednesday, Ayotte excoriated Feltes and Volinsky for refusing to stand “against violence directed at our police officers,” and failing to “appreciate the difficulty and danger our police officers face” while praising Governor Chris Sununu for “standing with law enforcement”: “Today I watched the tape of the Democrats Gubernatorial Debate between Dan Feltes and Andru Volinsky,” she said in a statement. “It is extremely disturbing that both said they would commute the sentence of convicted cop killer Michael Addison who murdered heroic Manchester Police officer Michael Briggs in cold blood. “Addison is a career criminal who had committed multiple armed robberies the week before he shot Officer Briggs in the head. Addison was convicted by a jury of his peers and his conviction was upheld by the New Hampshire Supreme Court. At a time when law enforcement officers are facing increasingly dangerous situations on a daily basis, our leaders should be standing against violence directed at our police officers, not commuting the sentences of convicted cop killers. “It is clear that neither Andru Volinksy nor Dan Feltes appreciate the difficulty and danger our police officers face when they put their lives on the line every day to keep us safe. I commend Governor Sununu for standing with law enforcement in N.H. and stating clearly that he would never commute Michael Addison’s sentence,” Ayotte said. Governor Sununu to the Democrats’ disturbing pledge on Tuesday, stating he was “shocked,” and would “never support commuting” Addison’s sentence: “Let me be very clear: I will never support commuting the sentence of a convicted cop killer like Michael Addison. I heard that clip [from the debate]. I was quite shocked by it. I think everybody in Manchester should be quite shocked by it. “Frankly, I think it sends the absolutely wrong message that when you have a convicted cop killer, you’re going to now decide that you would commute his sentence. I would never support that,” Sununu said. Officer Briggs left a wife and two young sons behind when he was shot and killed by Addison. One of his sons, Officer Mitchell Briggs, from the New Hampshire Police Academy in 2019. | | | | | | ---|---|--- New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street, Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States | | | |

You've now seen both parties' conventions, and boy was the difference big between the two.

While our convention focused on giving the American people hope for a better path forward, the Republican National Convention anchored itself in fear and division.

Now, there are less than nine weeks until Election Day, and our campaign is determined to keep pushing a positive vision for the future in everything that we do.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Your student's day
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's almost time to get back to school. That means it's time to stock up on notebooks, folders, pencils, highlighters - and masks. After months without seeing friends and teachers, I know many of you are excited to get back into school. Of course, a day at school this fall will look a little different than what you're used to. Here's what to expect:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2LyXitMbfzGN3v2xmFAiCUcAv2xjM3h9s-avzbVl9I2Lnllm1A4Ki4scTlrhYgjlCYETklLGfesU8PVnhD_RF8jqrrNctqHtX2I_84t15E2N_dHFfV4qfdkShIILyGPsKdpeKltdN64tBGRqlPkz9kLwJsv9ylV3p3sGYQxiZPHm5e47TgD9ddbRhEosCyrvF4NU3zvYXU=&c=jZEqH3XB7_Slkmn7L6_8fkmiH6qbxKUFAvxO0Ir_ThFrrG259E-08w==&ch=QLURxKM7UZnor1AcyE1tBSul0SZBi8F1KueSDimeWeOm3WO9EAnkbw==)
---
|
* When you wake up, one of the first things you'll do is check for symptoms. Most districts are encouraging students and parents to download Crush COVID as an easy way to keep track of symptoms each day. If you're symptom-free, you'll head to school.

* Transportation is going to look a bit different. Buses will have reduced capacity, bus stops will have clearly marked waiting spaces to ensure social distancing, hand sanitizer will be available, and students will have assigned seats. All students will also get a health screening before getting on a bus.

* Schools will change their drop-off procedures to prevent overcrowding by staggering schedules and providing multiple drop-off points. There will be health screenings walking into school as well.

* Once you're in your classroom, you'll have an assigned seat and will need to wear a mask throughout the day. Classrooms will have open windows, fans, and other measures to provide air circulation. In many places, learning will happen both indoors and outdoors.

* After a few classes, it'll be time for lunch. Most students will eat lunch in their classrooms with their stable groups, and in some districts, lunch will be eaten outside.

* You'll still get to have recess! Of course, you'll need to wash your hands before and after. When you're outside in your stable groups, you may have your own play equipment. And you may have a schedule for when to use certain parts of the school yard.

* At the end of the day, pick-up procedures will look a lot like drop-off, with staggered times and separate entrances to avoid crowding.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2LyXitMbfzGN3v2xmFAiCUcAv2xjM3h9s-avzbVl9I2Lnllm1A4KkjQ6ZSoEclJXrMAGX-vC3kXY1oGX1-Rmg7Ka5gPTlx4GRnCcTYBwYKBl_6N-EphiGcwMsiSbUaDd_yO5YoK3jGFaRdUF89E1vC2GK1EFQtvLuZg8zS7kJ6nkDfihCgVYm11VvKsHpHZYgkFzapkqPo=&c=jZEqH3XB7_Slkmn7L6_8fkmiH6qbxKUFAvxO0Ir_ThFrrG259E-08w==&ch=QLURxKM7UZnor1AcyE1tBSul0SZBi8F1KueSDimeWeOm3WO9EAnkbw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2LyXitMbfzGN3v2xmFAiCUcAv2xjM3h9s-avzbVl9I2Lnllm1A4KkjQ6ZSoEclJXrMAGX-vC3kXY1oGX1-Rmg7Ka5gPTlx4GRnCcTYBwYKBl_6N-EphiGcwMsiSbUaDd_yO5YoK3jGFaRdUF89E1vC2GK1EFQtvLuZg8zS7kJ6nkDfihCgVYm11VvKsHpHZYgkFzapkqPo=&c=jZEqH3XB7_Slkmn7L6_8fkmiH6qbxKUFAvxO0Ir_ThFrrG259E-08w==&ch=QLURxKM7UZnor1AcyE1tBSul0SZBi8F1KueSDimeWeOm3WO9EAnkbw==).
---
| Months of hard work and thoughtful planning have gone into reopening schools safely, and I want to thank all our school leaders for your creativity and innovation.
I'll be holding one more press conference tomorrow to round out a full week of back-to-school updates. I hope you'll join us at 1 p.m. tomorrow to finish the week strong.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=e3dc68d2-672f-49b2-8a0c-94c6fb548fa1)
---

We’re calling for the adoption of police body cameras, DOJ investigations after excessive force, enforcing a use-of-force standard, banning “no-knock” warrants, and so many more policies that make our communities safer.
_More than 75% of American voters SUPPORT these policies — they won’t just invest in our communities, they will make our policing safer and more just. We’re reimagining policing to make it better and more equitable._
**For the greater community, and for our children, we are committed to the fight for true public safety, justice, and equality for all.[Will you join us for calling for Justice Reform NOW?! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18996302/246033574/-655647402?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RmNzJhZS0zNGVlLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3fRtXuMIvhLe3KHKFwk6IL66fI4wrcFi5sgXWrFbcOI=&emci=5442ebdd-57ec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=a7df72ae-34ee-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)**
