Friend,

We were honored to host Second Lady Karen Pence in the Lowcountry yesterday.
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=cb117bb37ae949d7bbe774309c781dda&_e=aq0Y8EzNnrCt7JDOHgQSa2A4oIO1n3IKGXFWW89BrUvvT3F_XgpWFjA_06x1OXwOeCN2K-ESlC4cW1aB80JlR58Y7o16Y5FmRwoN1gDW6oxqH8a63cNyrNvzN9aYxnebv0RYKIZpy_tyrFpFK2LEdbOJ5s-w0JMj-W2CTMv9t-6pURbRuVR6hrb-4sZxNvDNL5JQy0WkokGi5DexMLj4xlhruEI1GJZXXfdRhZ2zpzYtSZqod_6Qkw6qc0y6qBOZt15BqA6F8-IZZWgA22GdTsHtiM4uX5yR4SPJjDqBbz7W7JeBIbleuAXhim8Tn4YokPoB3izBF3oXwQGXgT4_876HXtlD_YHABT_ZreRWX8UfbhNr10YRygyvR390cNrHUUv3vj6iYxbgIra6sWTne8lUsbUNDmmuVxPpzlZC0u7Nrtd9qUSM-Nh0LqIVjvfVwjCq2w1qiHLc3wTTr_nki3fMZOzAe-c8tcG18xBHHOM%3D)
It was an absolutely _huge_ boost for our campaign and our momentum is surging.

_She made a powerful pitch for Nancy and didn’t mince words when it came to what’s at stake at the ballot box on Election Day. The Second Lady laid out why conservatives in the Lowcountry (and across the country) are counting on Nancy to win on November 3rd_
_**“To keep moving forward, we need to send Nancy Mace to Congress. Now is not the time to give up. This is going to be a close race. It’s going to come down to the wire...South Carolina and America need to send Nancy Mace to congress to represent South Carolina's 1st Congressional District."** \- Second Lady Karen Pence_
[**Donate and Support Nancy —>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=cb117bb37ae949d7bbe774309c781dda&_e=aq0Y8EzNnrCt7JDOHgQSa2A4oIO1n3IKGXFWW89BrUvvT3F_XgpWFjA_06x1OXwOeCN2K-ESlC4cW1aB80JlR58Y7o16Y5FmRwoN1gDW6oxqH8a63cNyrNvzN9aYxnebv0RYKIZpy_tyrFpFK2LEdbOJ5s-w0JMj-W2CTMv9t-6pURbRuVR6hrb-4sZxNvDNL5JQy0WkokGi5DexMLj4xlhruEI1GJZXXfdRhZ2zpzYtSZqod_6Qkw6qc0y6qBOZt15BqA6F8-IZZWgA22GdTo-CCsFSV_s34_A3WxeLTf4jDYRIqLXRCupFuoz1_isbxiQ-Jndcu5uyxyTJWt4hWAICxkwwrfQg684hZQ6NGUOhYQTfl2KXAvB7ngnZ4LEJkMiiDkim2ZbuCHuYbZCmANRJeMQq2M1QfclVVmibwZ51YowC_fqT4PLJUqd2r77qkcHkxG6NCSSEAKwtS7Gjra8wGPZXhXvWEnh59IVfGfE%3D)
The Second Lady didn’t stop there — she gave a ringing endorsement of Nancy and touched on exactly why she’s the right person running at the right time.
_**"From the Waffle House to the Statehouse ... The common thread is that she's the hardest working person in the room. She has a record you can check, and boy is it different from that other guy's record."** \- Second Lady Karen Pence_
[**Donate and Support Nancy —>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=cb117bb37ae949d7bbe774309c781dda&_e=aq0Y8EzNnrCt7JDOHgQSa2A4oIO1n3IKGXFWW89BrUvvT3F_XgpWFjA_06x1OXwOeCN2K-ESlC4cW1aB80JlR58Y7o16Y5FmRwoN1gDW6oxqH8a63cNyrNvzN9aYxnebv0RYKIZpy_tyrFpFK2LEdbOJ5s-w0JMj-W2CTMv9t-6pURbRuVR6hrb-4sZxNvDNL5JQy0WkokGi5DexMLj4xlhruEI1GJZXXfdRhZ2zpzYtSZqod_6Qkw6qc0y6qBOZt15BqA6F8-IZZWgA22GdThKgjzr-hIM1r0ZdvwFVONzb37vy9Msgoy3MUtRG8TKJNThsY-XoPFkjqPJWG0YQST1LdSSEZoV0UEva_tMLRiF1_bFx9T5gRCwy3OtHYIB9St0FqwlQ19lUVmd6mtvsRqI89u9TiRSGv5FsTFamnXM1ixsNybE2St7NqndNp1Iqzh1eomVIbDmTaflJEWHTj_rI8T_JRxOQmKnIfKK-igw%3D)
**Friend, this was huge for our campaign. **

The Second Lady’s visit proves what we’ve been telling you all along — that our campaign is one of the top races in the entire country and its one that Republicans absolutely have to win.

We need to capitalize on the momentum from her visit, and that’s why we’re emailing you right now.

Will you join Second Lady Karen Pence in supporting Nancy and help her put the Lowcountry in 2020 and beyond?
[**Donate and Support Nancy —>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=cb117bb37ae949d7bbe774309c781dda&_e=aq0Y8EzNnrCt7JDOHgQSa2A4oIO1n3IKGXFWW89BrUvvT3F_XgpWFjA_06x1OXwOeCN2K-ESlC4cW1aB80JlR58Y7o16Y5FmRwoN1gDW6oxqH8a63cNyrNvzN9aYxnebv0RYKIZpy_tyrFpFK2LEdbOJ5s-w0JMj-W2CTMv9t-6pURbRuVR6hrb-4sZxNvDNL5JQy0WkokGi5DexMLj4xlhruEI1GJZXXfdRhZ2zpzYtSZqod_6Qkw6qc0y6qBOZt15BqA6F8-IZZWgA22GdTi61crnLNhUPjzgvzpobuRAMHplDGfJMMuCHBARWAcrz8tpAPzJ7l2yA1KBEuKNZMhJs5n-RBXno_onYIljgJYwmZ1r_9p7jpN_XmILzsiQzfhIyR9W0AnVGKYkcPEyyrrvJmu_GotJpjNfgc5sxQbXs7z-LGpWbfFCtgPXxmIt3MGuDVfIYkAGbJUfurzZVlhyFScxm4L9d42xdFuIrBdM%3D)

name: Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager
subject: throwback Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Before the tuna melt and the emergence of the Two Slice Man, Mark Warner was the governor of Virginia. Under his leadership, Virginia was named the Best Managed State, the #1 State for doing business, the best state for public education, and made historic investments in expanding rural broadband. Beyond those accomplishments though, the campaign had an incredible logo.

We've gotten a number of requests to recreate the logo so folks can showcase how long they've supported Mark Warner. **So, for Throwback Thursday this week, our campaign is taking it old school.** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db1f/53d9897e/55c81b3a/1c88036b/911827296/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/vintage-logo/")
---
For a limited time, you can snag your vintage t-shirts, stickers, and drink koozies over at **[_our campaign store._](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db1f/53d9897e/55c81b3a/1c88036b/911827296/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/vintage-logo/")**

Thank you for your support -- we're grateful!

-- Team Warner

P.S. We'd love to see pictures of you and your new Mark Warner swag! Make sure to follow and tag us on social media **@MarkWarnerVA.**

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db1f/53d9897e/55c81b3a/1c88036a/911827296/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200903_e_1_fl__756__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Barrett?=
subject: The gloves are off! New video out today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
We're finally exposing Barry Loudermilk for what he is |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=0e097deeab&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | – Our opponent’s record has gone under the radar for far too long, so today we released a new video that exposes Barry Loudermilk and what he’s all about.
[](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=73eb35e31d&e=e25784ff28) | | **[BOOST THE VIDEO](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=103accdf07&e=e25784ff28)**
---

Not only has Loudermilk _voted with Trump over 96% of the time_ , but his votes have put people in our community and the future of our democracy in danger. Don’t believe us? Well, let’s look at his record.
* He voted to take away health care coverage from millions of Americans with preexisting conditions,
* He co-sponsored a bill to dismantle the EPA,
* He voted against funding for the USPS that would ensure delivery of everything from mail-in ballots to prescription drugs,
* He voted against the Childcare for Recovery Act which expands the availability of quality child care for essential workers,
* **He compared the Congressional impeachment of Trump to the trial of Jesus,**
* He does not believe in vaccines and did not immunize his own children,
* AND, in the midst of an ongoing pandemic, he is openly ignoring the advice of our nation’s top health professionals, ignoring the use of face masks and social distancing, and is encouraging the use of treatments already found to be ineffective.

**Clearly, Loudermilk is more concerned with serving Trump than he is with doing his job and serving his constituents.**

[**Folks, can you chip in to help us get this video seen by everyone in this district?**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=266006ef31&e=e25784ff28)
| **[BOOST THE VIDEO](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=cf5697e606&e=e25784ff28)**
---

We need a leader that’s willing to do what’s best for our community, not what’s best for big corporations and Trump. A representative is supposed to be the voice of the people, not the president’s lapdog. (Clearly, Loudermilk has that confused.)

Help us get our video out across social media, in digital ads, and up on your TV. [**Chip in right now to make sure everyone knows who Loudermilk really is. →**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=f9464a654f&e=e25784ff28)
| **[CHIP IN NOW!](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=652742ddbd&e=e25784ff28)**
---

**We need a leader, not a lapdog -- and we need your help to defeat Barry Loudermilk.**

Thanks!

\-- Team Barrett

|
---
| | [Learn More About Our Campaign](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=0febc77bc4&e=e25784ff28 "Learn More About Our Campaign")

name: Rita Hart for Congress
subject: the final chapter of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJjf4mjsKMo_OYpC5awwkrNWuRv7Qd-Q5e5AdWqKJOU=/wPXU5_PlF0GRRAQjRryRZYHuaARiVi0uKM_pXTaCMRw=?refcode=200903-email) **Rita Hart is only 2 months away from the General Election** **[Will you show your support for Rita in the home stretch of this race by donating today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJjf4mjsKMo_OYpC5awwkrNWuRv7Qd-Q5e5AdWqKJOU=/wPXU5_PlF0GRRAQjRryRZYHuaARiVi0uKM_pXTaCMRw=?refcode=200903-email)** | ****[Donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJjf4mjsKMo_OYpC5awwkrNWuRv7Qd-Q5e5AdWqKJOU=/wPXU5_PlF0GRRAQjRryRZYHuaARiVi0uKM_pXTaCMRw=?refcode=200903-email)****
---
* * *
Peter,
Rita's race is entering the final stretch before Election Day. As we focus in on the General Election, we are still spreading Rita's message far and wide and taking every opportunity to listen and learn.
**[This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the entire country and we know that we can't afford to lose. name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Dr. Kim Schrier
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
In 2018, Dr. Kim Schrier flipped a red seat blue in Washington's 8th congressional district.
This year, Republicans have made her a top target -- and this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in Washington state. We can't let the GOP unseat a strong Democrat and chip away at our Democratic majority in the House. We need to help her fight back -- and win.
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution now to help re-elect Dr. Kim Schrier to Congress?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200902-kimschrier?refcode=em200902i_470&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
As a scientist, a doctor, and a parent, Dr. Kim Schrier is fighting hard every day in the other Washington to make sure our nation's COVID-19 response is driven by facts and science--not politics. She is working to ensure everyone has access to affordable health care, clean air and water, an excellent public education, and a shot at the American dream. Kim is a champion for our families and our values -- and an important voice in the fight for a better future for our country.
**I am proud to support Dr. Kim Schrier for re-election.** I hope you'll join me -- because we cannot afford to come up short in this race. There is just too much at stake in this election.
**[We need to keep Washington state -- and the U.S. House -- blue. Will you join the fight? Pitch in $5 now to support Dr. Kim Schrier's re-election campaign.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200902-kimschrier?refcode=em200902i_470&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

clean_body: Team, In 2018, Dr. Kim Schrier flipped a red seat blue in Washington's 8th congressional district. This year, Republicans have made her a top target -- and this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in Washington state. We can't let the GOP unseat a strong Democrat and chip away at our Democratic majority in the House. We need to help her fight back -- and win. "=" As a scientist, a doctor, and a parent, Dr. Kim Schrier is fighting hard every day in the other Washington to make sure our nation's COVID-19 response is driven by facts and science--not politics. She is working to ensure everyone has access to affordable health care, clean air and water, an excellent public education, and a shot at the American dream. Kim is a champion for our families and our values -- and an important voice in the fight for a better future for our country. I am proud to support Dr. Kim Schrier for re-election. I hope you'll join me -- because we cannot afford to come up short in this race. There is just too much at stake in this election. "=" Thank you, Patty "=" As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

| | | Dear Friend,

Donald Trump’s plan to defer the payroll tax, and by consequence defund social security, just got more real. The independent chief actuary of the Social Security Administration has just released figures that show Social Security Disability Insurance would be out of money by mid-2021 and Social Security in its entirety would be out of money by mid-2023.

Jackie Walorski has been trying to privatize social security for years.

[**Pat will be our advocate for Northern Indiana families. She will fight to protect Social Security, retirement benefits, and expand Medicare and Medicaid.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1d3a1002f3&e=5886ca081d)

body:
I just wanted to take a moment to sincerely thank you for all that you have done to help support me and my campaign in August. But now is not the time to back down. Republicans need to go on offense. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzA4ODcS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwNjYyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to sincerely thank you for all that you have done to help support me and my campaign in August.

Once again, we shattered our fundraising goals and it is clear that our side is fired up to win in November. I am humbled by the outpouring of support from patriots that want to defend the police, save our Senate Republican Majority and re-elect President Trump.

But now is not the time to back down. Republicans need to go on offense.

In fact, thanks to generous supporters like you, I launched a new ad in crucial swing states taking on Joe Biden and the liberal mob. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzA4ODcS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwNjYyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: =?utf-8?B?U8OhbmNoZXogSFE=?=
subject: Remember to fill out your Census form!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
As of today, you only have 27 days left to fill out your 2020 Census form!

Why does the Census matter?

Every ten years, our country relies on the Census to help determine how to spend billions of dollars in public funding. These funds help maintain public services like hospitals, schools, and roads -- but that's not all! We also use the Census to calculate how many Congressional Representatives are allotted to each state.

That's all to say -- an accurate Census is really, really important.

Haven't filled out your Census form yet? That's okay! You have the option to complete the Census by mail, by phone, or online. Just make sure you do it by September 30th.

-------------- Information on how to fill out your Census form ⬇️ --------------

Mail: You likely received a paper questionnaire sometime in mid-March. Included with the questionnaire should be detailed information and a Census ID (you'll need this if you want to complete the Census online). Once completed, you should return your Census questionnaire in the envelope provided. If you've lost the envelope, you can mail your questionnaire to the U.S. Census Bureau National Processing Center at 1201 E 10th Street Jeffersonville, IN 47132. You can find more information on how to respond and return your physical Census form, here.

Phone: You can respond to the 2020 Census by calling 844-330-2020 (English) or 844-468-2020 (Español), For additional information on responding to the Census via phone click here.

Online: You can complete the United States Census at https://my2020census.gov/. Please note that you must complete your questionnaire once you begin. If you leave the questionnaire and return later, you’ll be directed to start over. You can find more information on completing the Census online, here.

Thank you,

-- Sánchez HQ

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Ossoff Senior Staff
subject: Paris
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Truly, the future of our planet is at stake |
---
Friend,

As Donald Trump and his sycophants in Congress like David Perdue exacerbate the current public health and economic disaster, we can't forget about another crisis they have bungled: the climate crisis.

**The future of our planet is literally at stake.**

They've already started withdrawing the United States from the historic Paris Climate Agreement, taken climate change off our list of national security threats, and ignored critical data about the risks of climate change. That's in addition to loosening regulations that keep our air and water clean, and threatening wildlife.

_The Brookings Institution counts at least 74 actions (!!!) the Trump administration has taken to weaken environmental protections._

**If Trump and Perdue win another term, who knows what kind of long-lasting damage they can cause to the environment and the Earth?**

**It's so crucial that we not only defeat Trump but also retake the Senate -- and to win a Democratic Senate majority, Jon Ossoff has to beat Perdue in Georgia.**

And of course he will base energy and environmental policy on scientific evidence, not lobbying by polluters.

**It's for these reasons and more that the Sierra Club has endorsed Jon!**

Meanwhile, Jon's opponent, David Perdue, has taken over $350,000 from big oil and gas. Perhaps that's why Perdue has DENIED the real threat of climate change, advocated for ELIMINATING the Environmental Protection Agency, and supported LEAVING the Paris Agreement.

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Can you donate to our friends in Wisconsin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I've seen firsthand the impact of your grassroots donations, and now is the perfect time to show our strength to our friends in Wisconsin. |
---
Hey there, Peter --

Joe here. I'm in Wisconsin today to address the challenges that we are facing not only in the state, but across the country.

As you know, the Trump administration's terrible response to the pandemic made it impossible for us to be together in-person in Milwaukee for the Democratic National Convention.

Even in strong economies, the convention's host state looks forward to the financial boost the DNC gives.

Peter, my campaign and I think we've found a way to help, but we'll need you in a big way to get it done. We're fundraising for **United Migrant Opportunity Services** and the **Social Development Foundation** , two Wisconsin-based organizations dedicated to supporting underserved communities across the state.
* **[United Migrant Opportunity Services](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000bc/1698467123/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.umos.org/about-umos/")** , or **UMOS** , a non-profit advocacy organization, provides programs and services which improve the employment, educational, health, and housing opportunities of underserved populations.
* The **[Social Development Foundation](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000bb/1698467123/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://sd-foundation.org/give-now/")** powers the **Social Development Commission** , a Community Action Agency empowering Milwaukee County residents with resources and pathways to move beyond poverty.

| [Donate to UMOS](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000ba/1698467123/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.umos.org/donate/")
---
[Donate to the
Social Development Foundation](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000bb/1698467123/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://sd-foundation.org/give-now/")
---
**100 percent of your donations will go directly to these organizations, not a dollar to my campaign.**
Peter, I've seen firsthand the impact of your grassroots donations, and now is the perfect time to show our strength to our friends in Wisconsin. Please give anything you can, and encourage someone you know to do the same.

Thanks for your support. And to Wisconsin: This is the least we can do.
Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b9/1698467123/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b8/1698467123/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b7/1698467123/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b6/1698467123/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b5/1698467123/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b4/1698467123/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b3/1698467123/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b2/1698467123/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b1/1698467123/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b0/1698467123/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b3/1698467123/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000af/1698467123/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000b2/1698467123/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1a3/1cd0ac28/15809d691/357000ae/1698467123/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Hillary Holley
subject: INVITE: Upcoming Volunteer Events with Fair Fight Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702dbf8/879702217/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - With the general election quickly approaching, it is crucial we reach out to as many Georgians as possible about making a plan to vote and requesting their mail-in ballots if they plan to vote by mail. **Join us for our September weekends of action to text hundreds of thousands of voters across Georgia about requesting mail-in ballots; returning their ballots; signing up to be poll workers to help with early vote, Election Day, and vote by mail; and volunteering as poll observers and line warmers! With your help we can provide voters with the necessary resources to cast their vote and ways to get involved on the ground during voting. ** Vote-By-Mail Weekend of Action September 12 and 13 Virtual Phone and Text bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702dbf9/879702217/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/315552/") Vote-By-Mail Weekend of Action September 26 and 27 Virtual Phone and Text Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702dbf9/879702217/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/315552/") Poll Worker Recruitment Days of Action September 17-20 Virtual Phone and Text Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702da06/879702217/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/315746/") Line Warmer Recruitment Weekend of Action September 25-27 Virtual Phone and Text Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702da07/879702217/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/315752/") Directly contacting voters is a crucial way to ensure they have the information needed for this election. As we draw closer to the election and as mail-in ballots begin to be sent to voters, it's crucial that voters have a plan to cast their ballots and that they have the information they need to do so. Recruiting poll workers, line warmers, and poll observers is important to ensuring that elections are well-staffed and run smoothly, and that all eligible voters can cast their ballot. Georgia needs poll observers and line warmers at polling places across the state to make sure every voter is able to cast their ballot safely and efficiently. We need your help to recruit volunteers to support voters during early voting and Election Day! **[You can volunteer from anywhere - all you'll need is a laptop or tablet to send texts or a laptop and phone to make calls, and you can help us get the word out.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702dbf9/879702217/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/315552/")** Thank you all for your support and being in this fight. In solidarity, Hillary Holley Director of Organizing Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702da04/879702217/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702da05/879702217/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ad/34a064cc/1bc3a615/702da02/879702217/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Confirmed: Full school funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
From the beginning of this pandemic, Governor Holcomb has been committed to ensuring that our schools remain fully funded. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friends,

From the beginning of this pandemic, Governor Holcomb has been committed to ensuring that our schools remain **fully funded.** It’s critical for our students, our parents, our teachers and the future of our state.

And yesterday morning, the State Board of Education _**affirmed**_ Governor Holcomb’s long-standing commitment.

Governor Holcomb explains it all here:
[ ](facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/posts/1906042472863468)
**[Watch the video](facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/posts/1906042472863468)** and share it with your friends -- it's critically important that all Hoosiers know that when it comes to education, Governor Holcomb believes that our students must be equipped for the opportunities and 21st century careers of today and tomorrow.

That’s why he’s led the charge with the legislature to invest **$1.6 billion in new funding in K-12 education since 2017,** and that’s why **98% of Indiana school districts reported raises last year for teachers** thanks to additional state funding for school liabilities.

Together, we’re making progress, and together, we’ll continue to get Indiana Back on Track.

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden Attacks Laura: "For the Soul of our Nation . . ."
body:
Today, Joe Biden and his campaign lackeys took time away from their day to attack me.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391515-922493-5174834-6cf211a7ef-26f5a5f56e)
Patriot,

While I’m running against radical Democrat Lois Frankel, it looks like she couldn’t handle the heat I’m putting on her do-nothing career as a member of Congress, so she called in reinforcements . . .

. . . and Frankel went all the way to the top.

**Today, Joe Biden and his campaign lackeys took time away from their day to attack me.**

Here’s a screenshot of an official statement issued by Joe Biden's presidential campaign that aired on a CNN segment today that focused on my race:

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391515-922493-5174834-6cf211a7ef-26f5a5f56e)
Biden’s spokesman is right: this is a “battle for the soul of our nation.”

Do we abandon the prosperity of the first four years of President Trump, or do we veer hard left and risk it all for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris?

Do we fall for the trap of identity politics or focus on the two issues that matter the most: **our economy and our safety?**

My answer is clear.

[Help me respond in 24 hours to Joe Biden’s attack.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391515-922493-5174834-6cf211a7ef-26f5a5f56e)

[Donate now](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391515-922493-5174834-6cf211a7ef-26f5a5f56e) and be the first to see our ad that exposes Biden and the Democrat’s intent for our nation.

**Let’s show them what we can do together.**

Stay tuned, and thank you again for everything.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Read President Trump’s memo that puts weak Democrat mayors on notice
body:
President Trump signed a memorandum yesterday to hold local politicians accountable for refusing to protect their communities. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3c00d4bab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 3, 2020
---
| | |
# **Read President Trump’s memo that puts weak Democrat mayors on notice**

**President Trump signed** a memorandum yesterday to hold local politicians accountable for refusing to protect their communities from ongoing riots, lootings, and mass property destruction.

**Per the memo,** Federal agencies will identify what funds are provided to Seattle, Portland, New York City, and other jurisdictions that have allowed violence, lawlessness, and property damage to persist. Agencies will also determine what authorities are available to withhold these funds if and when necessary.

**Where permissible** , the Administration will restrict eligibility for certain Federal grants until these jurisdictions take the necessary steps to protect their residents.

📖 [**Read President Trump’s memo that puts weak politicians on notice**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54cf858ff3&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Without law and order** , democracy cannot function. Americans cannot exercise their rights, including their rights to peaceful expression, assembly, and protest,” the memo reads. “Property is destroyed, and innocent citizens are injured or killed.”

**Violence across the country** has cost U.S. taxpayers millions of dollars in damages to Federal office buildings. Dozens of Federal officers have been injured on the job, too.

**Protecting our citizens** is the first, most sacred duty of government. President Trump’s latest actions will help ensure that Americans’ hard-earned taxpayer dollars are not wasted by lawless governors and mayors who refuse to do their jobs.

**“This is yet another attempt** to make sure no more children like LeGend Taliferro die on our streets,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said.

📖 [**President Trump Is Fighting Lawlessness in America’s Cities**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d1104f827&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**Press Secretary: The violence could be stopped in 24 hours**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=00a517d844&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Vice President Pence: ‘We are going to keep our word for Life’**

**Vice President Mike Pence** participated in a “Life Wins! Tour“ event this afternoon in Raleigh, North Carolina, where he joined Susan B. Anthony List President Marjorie Dannenfelser and thanked the 837,000 men and women of SBA List for fighting to protect the lives of the unborn.

**He also praised** President Trump for being the most pro-life president in U.S. history.

**“The principle that every life is sacred** is literally at the center of the American experiment,” the Vice President said.

📷 [**PHOTOS: Vice President Pence visits Gateway Women’s Care in Raleigh**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=547b7773aa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **The White House ****North Portico lit in**** recognition of Childhood Cancer Awareness Month** | September 1, 2020
---
|

clean_body: Following COVID-19, Americans are fighting to reopen our economy and get our country back on track. Friend, Following COVID-19, Americans are fighting to reopen our economy and get our country back on track. Under President Trump, we saw a massive economic spike, and with President Trump in office, we can rebuild our economy. Our opponent fought back against President Trump’s tax cuts for Arizona families and instead gave California millionaires tax breaks . . . talk about out-of-touch. Tiffany Shedd is a small business owner, which means she understands exactly how crucial small town America is to rebuilding our economic success. She also understands exactly how President Trump’s tax cuts helped Arizona families, and she’ll fight to bring even more economic success to Arizona. Friend, who do you trust to rebuild our economy? Someone who voted to give California millionaires a tax break? Or a small business owner who will fight for tax cuts and support President Trump? Who do you trust to rebuild our economy? Thank you, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

subject: NY Bail Fail
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/293bf0f07424/ny-bail-fail?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

Crime in New York is on the [**rise**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=0ab09132db&e=9f843ba602).

Our cities and our communities are [**no longer safe**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=fe9fc60255&e=9f843ba602).

Look no further than New York City. Through the first seven months of 2020, NYC experienced 244 shootings, a **177 percent** increase from 2019. Other violent crimes like murder, burglaries, and grand theft auto are up as well. In Buffalo, shootings were up **54 percent** , and the homicide rate was up **82 percent**.

Albany Democrats and New York City socialists have blamed everything from the weather to law enforcement. But the truth is there are more criminals on the streets now than ever before thanks to their [**failed policies**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=274ab7e523&e=9f843ba602).

Last year, Democrats championed “bail reform,” which allowed individuals to be released without bail instead of incarcerated for crimes such as: promoting a sexual performance by a child, aggravated vehicular manslaughter, arson in the third degree when charged as a hate crime, and failure to register as a sex offender.

During violent rioting and looting, most individuals were arrested, taken to the police station, and released back onto the streets to loot and riot the following night. This is a prime example of Democrats’ inability to keep our communities safe.

We need your help to restore law and order, and this November, you can do precisely that. Spread the word and get involved. This November is about much more than a vote; it’s about our future for years to come.

Faithfully Yours,

Rob

P.S. - in case you are struggling to keep track of all the trouble these Democrats' pro-criminal policies have caused, visit [**nybailfail.com**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=26e4d09346&e=9f843ba602). Everything you need to know is conveniently located in one place.
